summary: Final verification sweep across 13 iter-32/33 checkpoints. Backend CPs 1,2,3,6,11,12 executed live via API (8/8 sub-assertions PASS). CP13 profile-photo state-sync fix VERIFIED on live UI. CPs 4,5,7,8,9,10 accepted from prior verified iterations (see /app/test_reports/iteration_32b.json, iteration_33.json, iteration_33_flows.json).

cp01_awaiting_approval_login.note: POST /auth/admin-pin-login before approval returns 403 with 'awaiting approval' + company name.

cp02_rejected_login_note.note: After rejection with admin_note, login returns 403 with 'rejected' + 'Reason: <note>'.

cp03_post_approval_login.note: After super_admin approves, admin-pin-login returns 200 with session_token and user.role='company_admin'.

cp04_company_request_optimistic_refresh.note: Not re-executed on UI this pass; previously verified in iteration_32.json (optimistic update works).

cp05_super_admin_punch_data_hidden.note: Previously verified end-to-end in /app/test_reports/iteration_32b.json (tab-punch=0, hero-shift=0, /attendance & /history redirect, bento-present-today=1).

cp06_present_not_punched_and_admin_appro.note: Employee ping inside geofence surfaces in /admin/attendance/present-not-punched.not_punched_in; approve-punch kind=in → 200, attendance.source='admin_approved'.

cp07_full_month_attendance_calendar.note: Not re-executed on UI this pass; previously verified in iteration_32.json (history-month-bar/label/prev/next + day drilldown).

cp08_home_tiles_blank_all_companies.note: Previously verified in iteration_33.json (bento-employees='—', bento-present-today='—', pick-company-hint visible; tiles populate after picking a company).

cp09_process_salary_flow.note: Previously verified in iteration_33.json + iteration_33_flows.json (payroll-run screen, month bar, process button, KPI row).

cp10_employee_policy_form.note: Previously verified in iteration_33.json + iteration_33_flows.json (policy-emp-<uid> → /employee-policy with salary/tier-1..3/save, validation on missing tier 1).

cp11_tier_bonus_payroll_nov2025.note: Seeded salary=30000, salary_1=2000, day_1=20, 22 IN punches Nov 2025 → base_gross=26400.0, tier_bonus=2000.0, gross=28400.0 (exact match).

cp12_email_monthly_report.note: recipients=self → 200 with sends[] (Resend 403 sandbox is a graceful failure, not 500). Empty scope (bogus user_ids) → 400 'No employees in scope to email.'. PDF generation OK.

cp13_profile_photo_state_sync.note: Fix confirmed in /app/frontend/app/profile-photo.tsx (useEffect syncs preview on user.profile_photo_base64). Live UI: after POST + reload, profile-photo-preview count=1 and profile-photo-remove count=1; tap remove → both counts return to 0 (fallback initial 'C' visible).

overall_verdict: ALL PASS or previously-verified SKIP — no regression detected. 7/7 executed checkpoints PASS; 6 checkpoints skipped as they were already verified in immediately preceding iterations (32b, 33, 33_flows).
